log.before:
# Design Specification for RealEstate Web Application

---

## Section 1: Flask Routes Specification (Backend)

| Route Path                 | HTTP Method | Function Name           | Template Rendered         | Route Parameters         | Context Variables Passed to Template (name : type) | POST Form Data Expected (name : type)                                  |
|----------------------------|-------------|------------------------|---------------------------|--------------------------|----------------------------------------------------|----------------------------------------------------------------------|
| /                          | GET         | root_redirect           | Redirects to /dashboard   | None                     | None                                               | None                                                                 |
| /dashboard                 | GET         | dashboard              | dashboard.html            | None                     | featured_properties : list of dict                         | None                                                                 |
| /properties                | GET         | property_search        | property_search.html       | None                     | properties : list of dict                                 | None                                                                 |
| /property/<int:property_id>| GET         | property_details       | property_details.html      | property_id (int)        | property : dict                                         | None                                                                 |
| /inquiry                   | GET         | inquiry_form           | inquiry.html               | None                     | properties : list of dict                               | None                                                                 |
| /inquiry                   | POST        | submit_inquiry         | Redirect or inquiry.html   | None                     | errors : dict (optional), properties : list of dict     | property_id : int, customer_name : str, customer_email : str,
customer_phone : str, message : str                          |
| /inquiries                | GET         | inquiries_list         | inquiries.html             | None                     | inquiries : list of dict                               | None                                                                 |
| /inquiries/delete/<int:inquiry_id> | POST        | delete_inquiry          | Redirect or inquiries.html | inquiry_id (int)        | inquiries : list of dict (if re-rendering)              | None                                                                 |
| /favorites                | GET         | favorites_list         | favorites.html             | None                     | favorite_properties : list of dict                      | None                                                                 |
| /favorites/add/<int:property_id> | POST        | add_favorite           | Redirect to favorites      | property_id (int)        | None                                               | None                                                                 |
| /favorites/remove/<int:property_id> | POST        | remove_favorite        | Redirect to favorites      | property_id (int)        | None                                               | None                                                                 |
| /agents                   | GET         | agents_list            | agents.html                | None                     | agents : list of dict                                   | None                                                                 |
| /locations                | GET         | locations_list         | locations.html             | None                     | locations : list of dict                               | None                                                                 |


### Details

#### root_redirect
- Redirects from '/' to '/dashboard'

#### dashboard
- Renders dashboard.html
- Context Variable: featured_properties (list of dict), each dict representing featured property details

#### property_search
- Renders property_search.html
- Context Variable: properties (list of dict) all available properties

#### property_details
- Parameter: property_id (int)
- Renders property_details.html
- Context Variable: property (dict) with all property details

#### inquiry_form (GET)
- Renders inquiry.html
- Context Variable: properties (list of dict) to populate the select-property dropdown

#### submit_inquiry (POST)
- Accepts form data:
  - property_id (int)
  - customer_name (str)
  - customer_email (str)
  - customer_phone (str)
  - message (str)
- On success redirects to inquiries list or confirmation
- On failure re-renders inquiry.html with errors context

#### inquiries_list
- Renders inquiries.html
- Context Variable: inquiries (list of dict) all inquiries

#### delete_inquiry (POST)
- Parameter: inquiry_id (int) to delete
- Redirects to /inquiries

#### favorites_list
- Renders favorites.html
- Context Variable: favorite_properties (list of dict) all favorite properties data

#### add_favorite (POST)
- Parameter: property_id (int)
- Adds favorite and redirects to /favorites

#### remove_favorite (POST)
- Parameter: property_id (int)
- Removes favorite and redirects to /favorites

#### agents_list
- Renders agents.html
- Context Variable: agents (list of dict) all agents data

#### locations_list
- Renders locations.html
- Context Variable: locations (list of dict) all locations data

---

## Section 2: HTML Templates (Frontend)

### 1. dashboard.html
- Page Title: Real Estate Dashboard
- Element IDs:
  - dashboard-page (Div)
  - featured-properties (Div)
  - browse-properties-button (Button)
  - my-inquiries-button (Button)
  - my-favorites-button (Button)
- Context Variables:
  - featured_properties (list of dict) - each dict contains property info (id, address, price, etc.)
- Navigation:
  - browse-properties-button: url_for('property_search')
  - my-inquiries-button: url_for('inquiries_list')
  - my-favorites-button: url_for('favorites_list')
- Forms: None

### 2. property_search.html
- Page Title: Property Search
- Element IDs:
  - search-page (Div)
  - location-input (Input text)
  - price-range-min (Input number)
  - price-range-max (Input number)
  - property-type-filter (Dropdown)
  - properties-grid (Div)
  - view-property-button-{property_id} (Button per property)
- Context Variables:
  - properties (list of dict) - all properties with details
- Navigation:
  - view-property-button-{property_id}: url_for('property_details', property_id=property_id)
- Forms: None (search input filtering handled client side or via query params)

### 3. property_details.html
- Page Title: Property Details
- Element IDs:
  - property-details-page (Div)
  - property-address (H1)
  - property-price (Div)
  - property-description (Div)
  - property-features (Div)
  - add-to-favorites-button (Button)
  - submit-inquiry-button (Button)
- Context Variables:
  - property (dict) with keys: property_id, address, price, description, bedrooms, bathrooms, square_feet
- Navigation:
  - add-to-favorites-button: form POST to url_for('add_favorite', property_id=property['property_id'])
  - submit-inquiry-button: url_for('inquiry_form') (likely with property selected pre-filled if client-side handled)
- Forms:
  - Add to favorites form with submit button add-to-favorites-button

### 4. inquiry.html
- Page Title: Submit Property Inquiry
- Element IDs:
  - inquiry-page (Div)
  - select-property (Dropdown)
  - inquiry-name (Input)
  - inquiry-email (Input email)
  - inquiry-phone (Input tel)
  - inquiry-message (Textarea)
  - submit-inquiry-button (Button)
- Context Variables:
  - properties (list of dict) for select-property dropdown
  - errors (dict) optional for validation errors
- Navigation:
  - None
- Forms:
  - Inquiry form POST to url_for('submit_inquiry') with fields:
    - select-property (property_id)
    - inquiry-name
    - inquiry-email
    - inquiry-phone
    - inquiry-message
    - Submit button id: submit-inquiry-button

### 5. inquiries.html
- Page Title: My Inquiries
- Element IDs:
  - inquiries-page (Div)
  - inquiries-table (Table)
  - inquiry-status-filter (Dropdown)
  - delete-inquiry-button-{inquiry_id} (Button per inquiry)
  - back-to-dashboard (Button)
- Context Variables:
  - inquiries (list of dict) each with inquiry details
- Navigation:
  - back-to-dashboard: url_for('dashboard')
- Forms:
  - Delete inquiry forms POST to url_for('delete_inquiry', inquiry_id=inquiry_id)

### 6. favorites.html
- Page Title: My Favorite Properties
- Element IDs:
  - favorites-page (Div)
  - favorites-list (Div)
  - remove-from-favorites-button-{property_id} (Button per property)
  - view-property-button-{property_id} (Button per property)
  - back-to-dashboard (Button)
- Context Variables:
  - favorite_properties (list of dict) all favorite properties details
- Navigation:
  - back-to-dashboard: url_for('dashboard')
  - view-property-button-{property_id}: url_for('property_details', property_id=property_id)
- Forms:
  - Remove from favorites forms POST to url_for('remove_favorite', property_id=property_id)

### 7. agents.html
- Page Title: Real Estate Agents
- Element IDs:
  - agents-page (Div)
  - agents-list (Div)
  - agent-search (Input)
  - contact-agent-button-{agent_id} (Button per agent)
  - back-to-dashboard (Button)
- Context Variables:
  - agents (list of dict) each containing agent details
- Navigation:
  - back-to-dashboard: url_for('dashboard')
- Forms:
  - contact-agent-button-{agent_id} (Button) action undefined (informational, no POST specified)

### 8. locations.html
- Page Title: Featured Locations
- Element IDs:
  - locations-page (Div)
  - locations-list (Div)
  - view-location-button-{location_id} (Button per location)
  - location-sort (Dropdown)
  - back-to-dashboard (Button)
- Context Variables:
  - locations (list of dict) all location details
- Navigation:
  - back-to-dashboard: url_for('dashboard')
- Forms:
  - None (sorting/filtering client side or via query)

---

## Section 3: Data File Schemas (Backend)

### 1. Properties Data
- File Path: data/properties.txt
- Pipe-delimited Fields (in order):
  - property_id
  - address
  - location
  - price
  - property_type
  - bedrooms
  - bathrooms
  - square_feet
  - description
  - agent_id
  - status
- Description: Stores detailed information about all properties in the system.
- Example Rows:
  - 1|123 Oak Street|Downtown|450000|House|3|2|2500|Beautiful family home with large yard|101|Available
  - 2|456 Park Avenue|Midtown|350000|Apartment|2|1.5|1200|Modern apartment with city view|102|Available
  - 3|789 Elm Road|Suburb|280000|Condo|2|2|1500|Cozy condo in quiet neighborhood|101|Sold

### 2. Locations Data
- File Path: data/locations.txt
- Pipe-delimited Fields (in order):
  - location_id
  - location_name
  - region
  - average_price
  - property_count
  - description
- Description: Stores information about locations including average price and property count.
- Example Rows:
  - 1|Downtown|Central|425000|45|Urban area with business district
  - 2|Midtown|Central|380000|38|Mixed residential and commercial zone
  - 3|Suburb|Outskirts|295000|52|Family-friendly residential area

### 3. Property Inquiries Data
- File Path: data/inquiries.txt
- Pipe-delimited Fields (in order):
  - inquiry_id
  - property_id
  - customer_name
  - customer_email
  - customer_phone
  - message
  - inquiry_date
  - status
- Description: Stores user inquiries about properties with contact details and inquiry status.
- Example Rows:
  - 1|1|John Smith|john@email.com|555-1234|Interested in viewing this weekend|2025-01-15|Pending
  - 2|2|Sarah Johnson|sarah@email.com|555-5678|Can we schedule a showing?|2025-01-16|Contacted
  - 3|1|Mike Davis|mike@email.com|555-9012|What is the lowest offer?|2025-01-17|Resolved

### 4. Favorite Properties Data
- File Path: data/favorites.txt
- Pipe-delimited Fields (in order):
  - favorite_id
  - property_id
  - added_date
- Description: Stores user favorite property references with dates added.
- Example Rows:
  - 1|1|2025-01-10
  - 2|2|2025-01-12
  - 3|3|2025-01-14

### 5. Real Estate Agents Data
- File Path: data/agents.txt
- Pipe-delimited Fields (in order):
  - agent_id
  - agent_name
  - specialization
  - email
  - phone
  - properties_sold
- Description: Stores real estate agent details including specialization and contact.
- Example Rows:
  - 101|Robert Wilson|Residential Properties|robert@email.com|555-0001|125
  - 102|Emily Chen|Commercial Real Estate|emily@email.com|555-0002|89
  - 103|James Martinez|Luxury Homes|james@email.com|555-0003|67

---

# End of design_spec.md

---

## Section 1: Flask Routes Specification (Backend)

| Route Path                 | HTTP Method | Function Name           | Template Rendered         | Route Parameters         | Context Variables Passed to Template (name : type) | POST Form Data Expected (name : type)                                  |
|----------------------------|-------------|------------------------|---------------------------|--------------------------|----------------------------------------------------|----------------------------------------------------------------------|
| /                          | GET         | root_redirect           | Redirects to /dashboard   | None                     | None                                               | None                                                                 |
| /dashboard                 | GET         | dashboard              | dashboard.html            | None                     | featured_properties : list of dict                         | None                                                                 |
| /properties                | GET         | property_search        | property_search.html       | None                     | properties : list of dict                                 | None                                                                 |
| /property/<int:property_id>| GET         | property_details       | property_details.html      | property_id (int)        | property : dict                                         | None                                                                 |
| /inquiry                   | GET         | inquiry_form           | inquiry.html               | None                     | properties : list of dict                               | None                                                                 |
| /inquiry                   | POST        | submit_inquiry         | Redirect or inquiry.html   | None                     | errors : dict (optional), properties : list of dict     | property_id : int, customer_name : str, customer_email : str,
customer_phone : str, message : str                          |
| /inquiries                | GET         | inquiries_list         | inquiries.html             | None                     | inquiries : list of dict                               | None                                                                 |
| /inquiries/delete/<int:inquiry_id> | POST        | delete_inquiry          | Redirect or inquiries.html | inquiry_id (int)        | inquiries : list of dict (if re-rendering)              | None                                                                 |
| /favorites                | GET         | favorites_list         | favorites.html             | None                     | favorite_properties : list of dict                      | None                                                                 |
| /favorites/add/<int:property_id> | POST        | add_favorite           | Redirect to favorites      | property_id (int)        | None                                               | None                                                                 |
| /favorites/remove/<int:property_id> | POST        | remove_favorite        | Redirect to favorites      | property_id (int)        | None                                               | None                                                                 |
| /agents                   | GET         | agents_list            | agents.html                | None                     | agents : list of dict                                   | None                                                                 |
| /locations                | GET         | locations_list         | locations.html             | None                     | locations : list of dict                               | None                                                                 |


### Details

#### root_redirect
- Redirects from '/' to '/dashboard'

#### dashboard

#### submit_inquiry (POST)

  - customer_phone (str)
  - message (str)

#### inquiries_list

- Redirects to /inquiries

#### add_favorite (POST)

- Adds favorite and redirects to /favorites

- Parameter: property_id (int)

#### locations_list

### 1. Properties Data

- Pipe-delimited Fields (in order):
  - property_id

  - bedrooms

  - square_feet
  - description
  - agent_id
  - status
- Description: Stores detailed information about all properties in the system.

- File Path: data/locations.txt
- Pipe-delimited Fields (in order):
  - location_id
  - location_name
  - region
  - average_price
  - property_count
  - description
- Description: Stores information about locations including average price and property count.
- Example Rows:
  - 1|Downtown|Central|425000|45|Urban area with business district
  - 2|Midtown|Central|380000|38|Mixed residential and commercial zone
  - 3|Suburb|Outskirts|295000|52|Family-friendly residential area

### 3. Property Inquiries Data
- File Path: data/inquiries.txt
- Pipe-delimited Fields (in order):
  - inquiry_id
  - property_id
  - customer_name
  - customer_email
  - customer_phone
  - message
  - inquiry_date
  - status
- Description: Stores user inquiries about properties with contact details and inquiry status.
- Example Rows:
  - 1|1|John Smith|john@email.com|555-1234|Interested in viewing this weekend|2025-01-15|Pending
  - 2|2|Sarah Johnson|sarah@email.com|555-5678|Can we schedule a showing?|2025-01-16|Contacted
  - 3|1|Mike Davis|mike@email.com|555-9012|What is the lowest offer?|2025-01-17|Resolved

### 4. Favorite Properties Data
- File Path: data/favorites.txt
- Pipe-delimited Fields (in order):
  - favorite_id
  - property_id
  - added_date
- Description: Stores user favorite property references with dates added.
- Example Rows:
  - 1|1|2025-01-10
  - 2|2|2025-01-12
  - 3|3|2025-01-14

### 5. Real Estate Agents Data
- File Path: data/agents.txt
- Pipe-delimited Fields (in order):
  - agent_id
  - agent_name
  - specialization
  - email
  - phone
  - properties_sold
- Description: Stores real estate agent details including specialization and contact.
- Example Rows:
  - 101|Robert Wilson|Residential Properties|robert@email.com|555-0001|125
  - 102|Emily Chen|Commercial Real Estate|emily@email.com|555-0002|89
  - 103|James Martinez|Luxury Homes|james@email.com|555-0003|67

---

# End of design_spec.md

# Design Specification for RealEstate Web Application

---

## Section 1: Flask Routes Specification (Backend)

| Route Path                        | HTTP Method | Function Name            | Template Rendered          | Route Parameters          | Context Variables (name : type)                              | Expected POST Form Data (name : type)                        |
|---------------------------------|-------------|-------------------------|----------------------------|---------------------------|--------------------------------------------------------------|--------------------------------------------------------------|
| /                               | GET         | root_redirect            | Redirects to /dashboard     | None                      | None                                                         | None                                                         |
| /dashboard                      | GET         | dashboard               | dashboard.html             | None                      | featured_properties : list (each element is dict)           | None                                                         |
| /properties                    | GET         | property_search         | property_search.html       | None                      | properties : list (each element is dict)                     | None                                                         |
| /property/<int:property_id>     | GET         | property_details        | property_details.html      | property_id (int)         | property : dict                                              | None                                                         |
| /inquiry                       | GET         | inquiry_form            | inquiry.html               | None                      | properties : list (dict), errors : dict (optional)           | None                                                         |
| /inquiry                       | POST        | submit_inquiry          | inquiry.html (on error) or redirect | None                | properties : list (dict) (only on error re-render)           | property_id : int, customer_name : str, customer_email : str, customer_phone : str, message : str |
| /inquiries                    | GET         | inquiries_list          | inquiries.html             | None                      | inquiries : list (each element is dict)                      | None                                                         |
| /inquiries/delete/<int:inquiry_id> | POST        | delete_inquiry          | Redirect to inquiries       | inquiry_id (int)          | None                                                         | None                                                         |
| /favorites                    | GET         | favorites_list          | favorites.html             | None                      | favorite_properties : list (each element is dict)            | None                                                         |
| /favorites/add/<int:property_id> | POST        | add_favorite            | Redirect to favorites       | property_id (int)         | None                                                         | None                                                         |
| /favorites/remove/<int:property_id> | POST        | remove_favorite         | Redirect to favorites       | property_id (int)         | None                                                         | None                                                         |
| /agents                       | GET         | agents_list             | agents.html                | None                      | agents : list (each element is dict)                         | None                                                         |
| /locations                    | GET         | locations_list          | locations.html             | None                      | locations : list (each element is dict)                      | None                                                         |

### Details

### root_redirect
- Redirects from '/' to '/dashboard'

### dashboard
- Renders dashboard.html
- Context Variables:
  - featured_properties (list of dict): Featured property recommendation details

### property_search
- Renders property_search.html
- Context Variables:
  - properties (list of dict): All available properties

### property_details
- Route Parameter:
  - property_id: int
- Renders property_details.html
- Context Variables:
  - property (dict): Details of a specific property

### inquiry_form (GET)
- Renders inquiry.html
- Context Variables:
  - properties (list of dict): Properties available for inquiry select dropdown
  - errors (dict, optional): Validation or submission errors

### submit_inquiry (POST)
- Accepts form data:
  - property_id (int)
  - customer_name (str)
  - customer_email (str)
  - customer_phone (str)
  - message (str)
- On validation failure, re-renders inquiry.html with errors and properties context
- On success, redirects to inquiries list page

### inquiries_list
- Renders inquiries.html
- Context Variables:
  - inquiries (list of dict): All user inquiries

### delete_inquiry (POST)
- Route Parameter:
  - inquiry_id (int) to delete
- Redirects to inquiries list page

### favorites_list
- Renders favorites.html
- Context Variables:
  - favorite_properties (list of dict): All favorite properties data

### add_favorite (POST)
- Route Parameter:
  - property_id (int) to add
- Redirects to favorites list page

### remove_favorite (POST)
- Route Parameter:
  - property_id (int) to remove
- Redirects to favorites list page

### agents_list
- Renders agents.html
- Context Variables:
  - agents (list of dict): Real estate agents data

### locations_list
- Renders locations.html
- Context Variables:
  - locations (list of dict): Popular locations data


---

## Section 2: HTML Templates (Frontend)

### 1. dashboard.html
- Page Title: Real Estate Dashboard
- Element IDs:
  - dashboard-page (Div)
  - featured-properties (Div)
  - browse-properties-button (Button)
  - my-inquiries-button (Button)
  - my-favorites-button (Button)
- Context Variables:
  - featured_properties (list of dict): Featured property recommendations with details like id, address, price
- Navigation Mappings:
  - browse-properties-button: url_for('property_search')
  - my-inquiries-button: url_for('inquiries_list')
  - my-favorites-button: url_for('favorites_list')
- Forms:
  - None

### 2. property_search.html
- Page Title: Property Search
- Element IDs:
  - search-page (Div)
  - location-input (Input text)
  - price-range-min (Input number)
  - price-range-max (Input number)
  - property-type-filter (Dropdown)
  - properties-grid (Div)
  - view-property-button-{property_id} (Button, dynamic per property)
- Context Variables:
  - properties (list of dict): Properties with data such as id, price, location, beds, baths
- Navigation Mappings:
  - view-property-button-{property_id}: url_for('property_details', property_id=property_id)
- Forms:
  - None (search and filtering may be client side or using query params)

### 3. property_details.html
- Page Title: Property Details
- Element IDs:
  - property-details-page (Div)
  - property-address (H1)
  - property-price (Div)
  - property-description (Div)
  - property-features (Div)
  - add-to-favorites-button (Button)
  - submit-inquiry-button (Button)
- Context Variables:
  - property (dict): Contains property_id, address, price, description, bedrooms, bathrooms, square_feet
- Navigation Mappings:
  - add-to-favorites-button: Form POST action url_for('add_favorite', property_id=property['property_id'])
  - submit-inquiry-button: url_for('inquiry_form')
- Forms:
  - Add to favorites form wrapping add-to-favorites-button

### 4. inquiry.html
- Page Title: Submit Property Inquiry
- Element IDs:
  - inquiry-page (Div)
  - select-property (Dropdown)
  - inquiry-name (Input text)
  - inquiry-email (Input email)
  - inquiry-phone (Input tel)
  - inquiry-message (Textarea)
  - submit-inquiry-button (Button)
- Context Variables:
  - properties (list of dict): For populating select-property dropdown
  - errors (dict, optional): Validation errors keyed by field
- Navigation Mappings:
  - None
- Forms:
  - Inquiry form with POST action url_for('submit_inquiry')
  - Input fields: select-property, inquiry-name, inquiry-email, inquiry-phone, inquiry-message
  - Submit button id: submit-inquiry-button

### 5. inquiries.html
- Page Title: My Inquiries
- Element IDs:
  - inquiries-page (Div)
  - inquiries-table (Table)
  - inquiry-status-filter (Dropdown)
  - delete-inquiry-button-{inquiry_id} (Button, per inquiry)
  - back-to-dashboard (Button)
- Context Variables:
  - inquiries (list of dict): Inquiries with details such as id, property, date, status, contact info
- Navigation Mappings:
  - back-to-dashboard: url_for('dashboard')
- Forms:
  - Each inquiry row has a form with POST action url_for('delete_inquiry', inquiry_id=inquiry_id) containing delete button delete-inquiry-button-{inquiry_id}

### 6. favorites.html
- Page Title: My Favorite Properties
- Element IDs:
  - favorites-page (Div)
  - favorites-list (Div)
  - remove-from-favorites-button-{property_id} (Button, per property)
  - view-property-button-{property_id} (Button, per property)
  - back-to-dashboard (Button)
- Context Variables:
  - favorite_properties (list of dict): Favorite properties with address, price, etc.
- Navigation Mappings:
  - back-to-dashboard: url_for('dashboard')
  - view-property-button-{property_id}: url_for('property_details', property_id=property_id)
- Forms:
  - Per-property form with POST action url_for('remove_favorite', property_id=property_id) wrapping remove-from-favorites-button-{property_id}

### 7. agents.html
- Page Title: Real Estate Agents
- Element IDs:
  - agents-page (Div)
  - agents-list (Div)
  - agent-search (Input text)
  - contact-agent-button-{agent_id} (Button, per agent)
  - back-to-dashboard (Button)
- Context Variables:
  - agents (list of dict): Agent details including photo, name, specialization, contact info
- Navigation Mappings:
  - back-to-dashboard: url_for('dashboard')
- Forms:
  - contact-agent-button-{agent_id}: No POST action defined (informational only)

### 8. locations.html
- Page Title: Featured Locations
- Element IDs:
  - locations-page (Div)
  - locations-list (Div)
  - view-location-button-{location_id} (Button, per location)
  - location-sort (Dropdown)
  - back-to-dashboard (Button)
- Context Variables:
  - locations (list of dict): Location details including name, count, average price
- Navigation Mappings:
  - back-to-dashboard: url_for('dashboard')
- Forms:
  - None (sorting/filtering client side or via query)

---

## Section 3: Data File Schemas (Backend)

### 1. Properties Data
- File Path: data/properties.txt
- Pipe-delimited Field Order:
  1. property_id
  2. address
  3. location
  4. price
  5. property_type
  6. bedrooms
  7. bathrooms
  8. square_feet
  9. description
  10. agent_id
  11. status
- Description: Detailed information about all properties available.
- Example Rows:
  - 1|123 Oak Street|Downtown|450000|House|3|2|2500|Beautiful family home with large yard|101|Available
  - 2|456 Park Avenue|Midtown|350000|Apartment|2|1.5|1200|Modern apartment with city view|102|Available
  - 3|789 Elm Road|Suburb|280000|Condo|2|2|1500|Cozy condo in quiet neighborhood|101|Sold

### 2. Locations Data
- File Path: data/locations.txt
- Pipe-delimited Field Order:
  1. location_id
  2. location_name
  3. region
  4. average_price
  5. property_count
  6. description
- Description: Information about locations with property counts and average prices.
- Example Rows:
  - 1|Downtown|Central|425000|45|Urban area with business district
  - 2|Midtown|Central|380000|38|Mixed residential and commercial zone
  - 3|Suburb|Outskirts|295000|52|Family-friendly residential area

### 3. Property Inquiries Data
- File Path: data/inquiries.txt
- Pipe-delimited Field Order:
  1. inquiry_id
  2. property_id
  3. customer_name
  4. customer_email
  5. customer_phone
  6. message
  7. inquiry_date
  8. status
- Description: User inquiries about properties including status and contact info.
- Example Rows:
  - 1|1|John Smith|john@email.com|555-1234|Interested in viewing this weekend|2025-01-15|Pending
  - 2|2|Sarah Johnson|sarah@email.com|555-5678|Can we schedule a showing?|2025-01-16|Contacted
  - 3|1|Mike Davis|mike@email.com|555-9012|What is the lowest offer?|2025-01-17|Resolved

### 4. Favorite Properties Data
- File Path: data/favorites.txt
- Pipe-delimited Field Order:
  1. favorite_id
  2. property_id
  3. added_date
- Description: User favorite property IDs with dates when added.
- Example Rows:
  - 1|1|2025-01-10
  - 2|2|2025-01-12
  - 3|3|2025-01-14

### 5. Real Estate Agents Data
- File Path: data/agents.txt
- Pipe-delimited Field Order:
  1. agent_id
  2. agent_name
  3. specialization
  4. email
  5. phone
  6. properties_sold
- Description: Real estate agents and their details.
- Example Rows:
  - 101|Robert Wilson|Residential Properties|robert@email.com|555-0001|125
  - 102|Emily Chen|Commercial Real Estate|emily@email.com|555-0002|89
  - 103|James Martinez|Luxury Homes|james@email.com|555-0003|67

---

# End of design_spec.md

# Design Specification for RealEstate Web Application

---

## Section 1: Flask Routes Specification (Backend)

| Route Path                        | HTTP Method | Function Name            | Template Rendered          | Route Parameters          | Context Variables (name : type)                              | Expected POST Form Data (name : type)                        |
|---------------------------------|-------------|-------------------------|----------------------------|---------------------------|--------------------------------------------------------------|--------------------------------------------------------------|
| /                               | GET         | root_redirect            | Redirects to /dashboard     | None                      | None                                                         | None                                                         |
| /dashboard                      | GET         | dashboard               | dashboard.html             | None                      | featured_properties : list (each element is dict)           | None                                                         |
| /properties                    | GET         | property_search         | property_search.html       | None                      | properties : list (each element is dict)                     | None                                                         |
| /property/<int:property_id>     | GET         | property_details        | property_details.html      | property_id (int)         | property : dict                                              | None                                                         |
| /inquiry                       | GET         | inquiry_form            | inquiry.html               | None                      | properties : list (dict), errors : dict (optional)           | None                                                         |
| /inquiry                       | POST        | submit_inquiry          | inquiry.html (on error) or redirect | None                | properties : list (dict) (only on error re-render)           | property_id : int, customer_name : str, customer_email : str, customer_phone : str, message : str |
| /inquiries                    | GET         | inquiries_list          | inquiries.html             | None                      | inquiries : list (each element is dict)                      | None                                                         |
| /inquiries/delete/<int:inquiry_id> | POST        | delete_inquiry          | Redirect to inquiries       | inquiry_id (int)          | None                                                         | None                                                         |
| /favorites                    | GET         | favorites_list          | favorites.html             | None                      | favorite_properties : list (each element is dict)            | None                                                         |
| /favorites/add/<int:property_id> | POST        | add_favorite            | Redirect to favorites       | property_id (int)         | None                                                         | None                                                         |
| /favorites/remove/<int:property_id> | POST        | remove_favorite         | Redirect to favorites       | property_id (int)         | None                                                         | None                                                         |
| /agents                       | GET         | agents_list             | agents.html                | None                      | agents : list (each element is dict)                         | None                                                         |
| /locations                    | GET         | locations_list          | locations.html             | None                      | locations : list (each element is dict)                      | None                                                         |

### Details

### root_redirect
- Redirects from '/' to '/dashboard'

### dashboard
- Renders dashboard.html
- Context Variables:
  - featured_properties (list of dict): Featured property recommendation details

### property_search
- Renders property_search.html
- Context Variables:
  - properties (list of dict): All available properties

### property_details
- Route Parameter:
  - property_id: int
- Renders property_details.html
- Context Variables:
  - property (dict): Details of a specific property

### inquiry_form (GET)
- Renders inquiry.html
- Context Variables:
  - properties (list of dict): Properties available for inquiry select dropdown
  - errors (dict, optional): Validation or submission errors

### submit_inquiry (POST)
- Accepts form data:
  - property_id (int)
  - customer_name (str)
  - customer_email (str)
  - customer_phone (str)
  - message (str)
- On validation failure, re-renders inquiry.html with errors and properties context
- On success, redirects to inquiries list page

### inquiries_list
- Renders inquiries.html
- Context Variables:
  - inquiries (list of dict): All user inquiries

### delete_inquiry (POST)
- Route Parameter:
  - inquiry_id (int) to delete
- Redirects to inquiries list page

### favorites_list
- Renders favorites.html
- Context Variables:
  - favorite_properties (list of dict): All favorite properties data

### add_favorite (POST)
- Route Parameter:
  - property_id (int) to add
- Redirects to favorites list page

### remove_favorite (POST)
- Route Parameter:
  - property_id (int) to remove
- Redirects to favorites list page

### agents_list
- Renders agents.html
- Context Variables:
  - agents (list of dict): Real estate agents data

### locations_list
- Renders locations.html
- Context Variables:
  - locations (list of dict): Popular locations data


---

## Section 2: HTML Templates (Frontend)

### 1. dashboard.html
- Page Title: Real Estate Dashboard
- Element IDs:
  - dashboard-page (Div)
  - featured-properties (Div)
  - browse-properties-button (Button)
  - my-inquiries-button (Button)
  - my-favorites-button (Button)
- Context Variables:
  - featured_properties (list of dict): Featured property recommendations with details like id, address, price
- Navigation Mappings:
  - browse-properties-button: url_for('property_search')
  - my-inquiries-button: url_for('inquiries_list')
  - my-favorites-button: url_for('favorites_list')
- Forms:
  - None

### 2. property_search.html
- Page Title: Property Search
- Element IDs:
  - search-page (Div)
  - location-input (Input text)
  - price-range-min (Input number)
  - price-range-max (Input number)
  - property-type-filter (Dropdown)
  - properties-grid (Div)
  - view-property-button-{property_id} (Button, dynamic per property)
- Context Variables:
  - properties (list of dict): Properties with data such as id, price, location, beds, baths
- Navigation Mappings:
  - view-property-button-{property_id}: url_for('property_details', property_id=property_id)
- Forms:
  - None (search and filtering may be client side or using query params)

### 3. property_details.html
- Page Title: Property Details
- Element IDs:
  - property-details-page (Div)
  - property-address (H1)
  - property-price (Div)
  - property-description (Div)
  - property-features (Div)
  - add-to-favorites-button (Button)
  - submit-inquiry-button (Button)
- Context Variables:
  - property (dict): Contains property_id, address, price, description, bedrooms, bathrooms, square_feet
- Navigation Mappings:
  - add-to-favorites-button: Form POST action url_for('add_favorite', property_id=property['property_id'])
  - submit-inquiry-button: url_for('inquiry_form')
- Forms:
  - Add to favorites form wrapping add-to-favorites-button

### 4. inquiry.html
- Page Title: Submit Property Inquiry
- Element IDs:
  - inquiry-page (Div)
  - select-property (Dropdown)
  - inquiry-name (Input text)
  - inquiry-email (Input email)
  - inquiry-phone (Input tel)
  - inquiry-message (Textarea)
  - submit-inquiry-button (Button)
- Context Variables:
  - properties (list of dict): For populating select-property dropdown
  - errors (dict, optional): Validation errors keyed by field
- Navigation Mappings:
  - None
- Forms:
  - Inquiry form with POST action url_for('submit_inquiry')
  - Input fields: select-property, inquiry-name, inquiry-email, inquiry-phone, inquiry-message
  - Submit button id: submit-inquiry-button

### 5. inquiries.html
- Page Title: My Inquiries
- Element IDs:
  - inquiries-page (Div)
  - inquiries-table (Table)
  - inquiry-status-filter (Dropdown)
  - delete-inquiry-button-{inquiry_id} (Button, per inquiry)
  - back-to-dashboard (Button)
- Context Variables:
  - inquiries (list of dict): Inquiries with details such as id, property, date, status, contact info
- Navigation Mappings:
  - back-to-dashboard: url_for('dashboard')
- Forms:
  - Each inquiry row has a form with POST action url_for('delete_inquiry', inquiry_id=inquiry_id) containing delete button delete-inquiry-button-{inquiry_id}

### 6. favorites.html
- Page Title: My Favorite Properties
- Element IDs:
  - favorites-page (Div)
  - favorites-list (Div)
  - remove-from-favorites-button-{property_id} (Button, per property)
  - view-property-button-{property_id} (Button, per property)
  - back-to-dashboard (Button)
- Context Variables:
  - favorite_properties (list of dict): Favorite properties with address, price, etc.
- Navigation Mappings:
  - back-to-dashboard: url_for('dashboard')
  - view-property-button-{property_id}: url_for('property_details', property_id=property_id)
- Forms:
  - Per-property form with POST action url_for('remove_favorite', property_id=property_id) wrapping remove-from-favorites-button-{property_id}

### 7. agents.html
- Page Title: Real Estate Agents
- Element IDs:
  - agents-page (Div)
  - agents-list (Div)
  - agent-search (Input text)
  - contact-agent-button-{agent_id} (Button, per agent)
  - back-to-dashboard (Button)
- Context Variables:
  - agents (list of dict): Agent details including photo, name, specialization, contact info
- Navigation Mappings:
  - back-to-dashboard: url_for('dashboard')
- Forms:
  - contact-agent-button-{agent_id}: No POST action defined (informational only)

### 8. locations.html
- Page Title: Featured Locations
- Element IDs:
  - locations-page (Div)
  - locations-list (Div)
  - view-location-button-{location_id} (Button, per location)
  - location-sort (Dropdown)
  - back-to-dashboard (Button)
- Context Variables:
  - locations (list of dict): Location details including name, count, average price
- Navigation Mappings:
  - back-to-dashboard: url_for('dashboard')
- Forms:
  - None (sorting/filtering client side or via query)

---

## Section 3: Data File Schemas (Backend)

### 1. Properties Data
- File Path: data/properties.txt
- Pipe-delimited Field Order:
  1. property_id
  2. address
  3. location
  4. price
  5. property_type
  6. bedrooms
  7. bathrooms
  8. square_feet
  9. description
  10. agent_id
  11. status
- Description: Detailed information about all properties available.
- Example Rows:
  - 1|123 Oak Street|Downtown|450000|House|3|2|2500|Beautiful family home with large yard|101|Available
  - 2|456 Park Avenue|Midtown|350000|Apartment|2|1.5|1200|Modern apartment with city view|102|Available
  - 3|789 Elm Road|Suburb|280000|Condo|2|2|1500|Cozy condo in quiet neighborhood|101|Sold

### 2. Locations Data
- File Path: data/locations.txt
- Pipe-delimited Field Order:
  1. location_id
  2. location_name
  3. region
  4. average_price
  5. property_count
  6. description
- Description: Information about locations with property counts and average prices.
- Example Rows:
  - 1|Downtown|Central|425000|45|Urban area with business district
  - 2|Midtown|Central|380000|38|Mixed residential and commercial zone
  - 3|Suburb|Outskirts|295000|52|Family-friendly residential area

### 3. Property Inquiries Data
- File Path: data/inquiries.txt
- Pipe-delimited Field Order:
  1. inquiry_id
  2. property_id
  3. customer_name
  4. customer_email
  5. customer_phone
  6. message
  7. inquiry_date
  8. status
- Description: User inquiries about properties including status and contact info.
- Example Rows:
  - 1|1|John Smith|john@email.com|555-1234|Interested in viewing this weekend|2025-01-15|Pending
  - 2|2|Sarah Johnson|sarah@email.com|555-5678|Can we schedule a showing?|2025-01-16|Contacted
  - 3|1|Mike Davis|mike@email.com|555-9012|What is the lowest offer?|2025-01-17|Resolved

### 4. Favorite Properties Data
- File Path: data/favorites.txt
- Pipe-delimited Field Order:
  1. favorite_id
  2. property_id
  3. added_date
- Description: User favorite property IDs with dates when added.
- Example Rows:
  - 1|1|2025-01-10
  - 2|2|2025-01-12
  - 3|3|2025-01-14

### 5. Real Estate Agents Data
- File Path: data/agents.txt
- Pipe-delimited Field Order:
  1. agent_id
  2. agent_name
  3. specialization
  4. email
  5. phone
  6. properties_sold
- Description: Real estate agents and their details.
- Example Rows:
  - 101|Robert Wilson|Residential Properties|robert@email.com|555-0001|125
  - 102|Emily Chen|Commercial Real Estate|emily@email.com|555-0002|89
  - 103|James Martinez|Luxury Homes|james@email.com|555-0003|67

---

# End of design_spec.md
